smg.text: Mainly fine. Mist later. Force 2 to 3 southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. Mist at first. A few light rain patches. Force 2 to 4 easterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few light rain patches. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Mist at night. Force 2 to 4 east to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Mist in the morning and at night. Force 2 to 3 southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Mist in the morning and at night. Force 2 to 3 south to southeasterly winds.
